## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into Talaera's product and positioning for marketing strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Talaera is shifting from a services-first model to a software platform, with the new AI coach, "Tali," as the key differentiator.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [**Tali's Edge:** Tali is trained on Talaera's proprietary 900-point communication framework, derived from tens of thousands of hours of real coaching data. This makes it a highly specialized, business-focused tool, unlike generic AI.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**B2B Value:** The HR Dashboard provides L\&D leaders with critical autonomy—the ability to reallocate coaching sessions among employees—solving a major pain point and ensuring budget efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [**B2C Narrative:** The "Momentum" plan combines Tali (safe practice) with the Speaking Club (real-world connection) to build confidence and trust, positioning Talaera as a community for professionals.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Pivot: Services → Software

  - [Talaera is repositioning as a software platform at the intersection of language, culture, and business communication.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [**Goal:** Combine AI efficiency with human coaching, framing it as a "GrowthX model" for language learning.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [**Product Stack:**](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [**Software:** E-learning catalog, Tali AI coach, HR analytics dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [**Services:** 1-on-1 coaching, group courses, workshops, webinars.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

### Product Deep Dive: Platform & Features

  - [**English Level Test:** A free, adaptive 10-minute diagnostic for organizations of any size (e.g., 10,000 employees).](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [**Speaking Club:** Live, low-pressure group practice sessions several times a week.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [**E-learning Catalog:** Searchable content on business topics (Meetings, Confidence) and culture (e.g., U.S. business norms).](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [**1-on-1 Coaching:**](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
      - [**Matching:** A human-curated process uses an algorithm to recommend a top 5 list of teachers based on learner background, role, and goals.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This ensures a strong fit, resulting in a very low teacher-switch rate.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)

### "Tali" AI Coach: The Differentiator

  - [**Core Function:** An AI coach for practicing business conversations in a safe, low-pressure environment.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [**Multilingual Support:** Switches languages on demand for recaps (e.g., Bosnian demo was successful).](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [**Integrated Ecosystem:** Creates exercises, adds terms to a personal dictionary, and maps progress against the 900-point skill framework.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [**Proprietary Training:** Tali's effectiveness comes from being trained on Talaera's unique 900-point communication skills framework, which was built from tens of thousands of hours of real coaching data.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Usage Limit:** 60 minutes/month.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is the recommended time for optimal results (3x 5-min sessions/week), not an arbitrary cap. It also manages costs for an expensive AI model.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)

### B2B Value: HR Dashboard & Analytics

  - [**Primary Benefit:** Provides L\&D leaders with autonomy to manage their team's learning.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [**Key Capabilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
      - [**Session Reallocation:** Move coaching sessions between employees to ensure budget efficiency and reward engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
      - [**Detailed Reporting:** Monthly reports on engagement, content usage, and learner progress.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [**Account Support:** Dedicated account managers provide same-day responses, a key differentiator from competitors like Preply.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)

### B2C Strategy: Building Trust & Community

  - [**"Momentum" Plan:** A cost-effective, scalable subscription offering Tali AI, the Speaking Club, and the e-learning catalog.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [**Core Narrative:** The combination of Tali (safe practice) and the Speaking Club (real-world connection) builds confidence and trust.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [**Community Appeal:** Highlighting the professional network (e.g., managers from Microsoft) attracts aspirational learners.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [**Persona Focus:** The current priority is B2C managers at a B2 level who want to project authority. The long-term goal is to expand to other segments (analysts, junior roles).](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:** Update marketing artifacts (company context, personas, writing guidelines) with new product and positioning details.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [**Aida:** Share updated artifacts with the Talaera team via Slack for review.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [**Team:** Discuss B2C persona strategy in the next meeting, leveraging insights from Aida's experience with Preply.](https://fathom.video/share/7_PsAEqj6p9TfqULNkmVbemzq_r-fxUT?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
